title: Differential-Geometry-Guided Adversarial Negative Mining for EqM (DG-ANM)

jobs.fid_eval: 12590806 (COMPLETED, 50K samples, gd sampler eta=0.003 steps=250 cfg=1.0)

stage_b_in1k_baseline.config_validated: Linear path, velocity prediction, c(γ) hardcoded interp=0.8 λ=4 (transport.py:122-126). loss_weight=None. global_batch=256 4-GPU DDP seas_gpu.
stage_b_in1k_baseline.implications: Vanilla pipeline reproduces paper. Baseline-first rule per CLAUDE.md research process satisfied. v10 hard-example EqM work unblocked.

stages.A: Variant-search autoresearch: find a DG-ANM code variant that beats vanilla EqM on CIFAR-10 25ep proxy (CURRENT). Hyperparameter sweeps abandoned — see documentation/research-plan.md.
stages.A.5: Paper-scale CIFAR confirmation: promote winning variant to 150ep 3-seed 10K FID; must beat vanilla by >=1 FID.
stages.B: IN-100 class-conditional, EqM-B/2, 80ep, winning-variant vs vanilla EqM (3 seeds each, 50K FID). GATED on A.5 passing.
stages.C: Scaling curves (S/2, B/2, L/2 on IN-100) + CIFAR-10 secondary result
stages.D: Mechanism analyses + ablation tables + negative-mining baseline comparisons

publication_goal.stage_a_exit_gate: best variant's pilot 25ep 10K-FID must beat v00_vanilla by >=1 FID on at least 3 seeds
publication_goal.stage_a5_exit_gate: winning variant's 150ep 3-seed 10K-FID must beat vanilla (~9.5) by >=1 FID

reference_numbers.in100_vanilla_80ep_3seed_FID_BLOCKED: train+sample complete; FID step failed on ref-stats schema mismatch (KeyError: mu); fixable offline

publication_goal.framing: Branch B-Both: PGD-on-target (v10) + CAFM-style discriminator AT (Lin et al. 2026). Primary on EqM-B/2 IN-1K (Phases 1-4); SiT head-to-head Phase 5.
publication_goal.primary_prior: Lin et al. 2026 AFM (arxiv 2511.22475, ICML 2026) + CAFM (arxiv 2604.11521). Code: github.com/ByteDance-Seed/Adversarial-Flow-Models (MIT).
publication_goal.sharpened_claim: First adaptive hard-negative mining for regression-target generative models. PGD-mined hard examples compose with CAFM-style discriminator post-training to compound FID gains on EqM. (per VeCoR future-work cite; differentiated from DAT, CAFM, ACT, AEBM-Diff, Rob-GAN.)
contributions: First port of CAFM-style adversarial AT to EqM family
First combination of PGD-input-mining with GAN-discriminator AT on regression-target flow models
SiT head-to-head confirmation that combination generalizes

next_action.command: Monitor: v10 CIFAR sanity (13848000, ~6h) + CAFM-EqM smoke (13848066, ~15min). On smoke PASS: submit full 10ep CAFM-EqM run (cafm_eqm_b2_in256.sbatch). On smoke FAIL: debug per logs. On v10 CIFAR PASS: Phase 1 unblocked.
next_action.reason: Plan locked 2026-05-19 in documentation/summer-2026-plan.md. Broad framing approved (EqM-first, flow-matching transfer Phase 4). Venues: NeurIPS 2026 workshop (Aug 29) + ICLR 2027 (~Oct 1). Differentiation memo locked vs DAT (Wu 2025, 2510.13872) and AEBM-Diff (Geng 2024, 2403.01666). v10 mechanism-aligned per CLAUDE.md.
phase_0_tasks: v11 fallback sketch (in case v10 fails Phase 1 gate)
next_action.phase_1_gate: v10 IN-1K-256 EqM-B/2 80ep seed 0 FID <= 30.41 (vs trusted vanilla 31.41). Otherwise 1 retune of lambda then kill.
next_action.lit_review: leads phase; synthesis informs v10 code + v11 sketch + framing
next_action.needs_user: Yes — cluster SSH credentials need refresh for v02 postmortem and Phase 0.C.2 smoke. Local code work can proceed without.

round_1_first_attempt_25ep_INVALID.verdict: 25ep too short to resolve known 150ep gap; v01 mining inert at random init. Proxy bumped to 100ep, v01 dropped from proxy.

autoresearch_variants.round_1_retry_purpose: v00_vanilla x 3 seeds at 100ep to pin (mu_vanilla, sigma_vanilla) noise floor

vanilla_noise_floor.validity_check: 2K e100 mean 29.71 +- 0.19 matches prior cifar_seed_study vanilla e100 30.18 +- 0.28 (within 1 sigma) — proxy is valid

autoresearch_variants.round_2_skip_reason: v05 inherits v01's inert hinge; near-zero probability of beating vanilla. Run later for paper appendix if needed.

completed_runs.note: v02 Stage B IN-1K attempts cancelled twice; reason not recorded. v10 proposal drafted as pivot (PGA saturation hypothesis at EqM-B/2 scale).
Reconciled from sacct + results_variants.tsv (pipeline state was 3 weeks stale).

rounds.R3 (5-01): 150ep variant harness: v02 12.26 KEEP, v06 13.73, v03 14.10
rounds.R6 (5-06): v09 Jacobian penalty: collapsed lambda=0.1, neutral lambda=0.001 (jobs 10673957, 10768964)

stage_a_gate.verdict: PASSED for v02_score_repulsion (and v07_anneal_v02 which ties)

completed_runs.description: Round 2: v04_ebm_contrastive @ 100ep, seed 0. InfoNCE softplus on velocity-norm energy (Du 2021 CD).
Round 2: v02_score_repulsion @ 100ep, seed 0. VeCoR-style two-sided cosine contrastive (Jiang 2025).
Round 2 retry: v06_diffusion_recovery @ 100ep seed 0 on gpu (8898147 OOM'd on gpu_test 20G).
Round 2 retry: v03_noised_negatives @ 100ep seed 0 on gpu (8898137 OOM'd on gpu_test 20G). Mining at t~U(0,1) instead of hardcoded t=1 (Luo 2023 DCD).

completed_runs.failure_mode: CUDA OOM at first forward pass
completed_runs.root_cause: gpu_test 20G card insufficient for mining variants (PGA = 3-4x activation memory). Resubmitted to gpu as 8941251.

completed_runs.failure_mode: CUDA OOM at first forward pass
completed_runs.root_cause: Same as 8898137. Resubmitted to gpu as 8941252.

completed_runs.description: R1 retry: v00_vanilla 100ep, seed 0. Validates proxy at 100ep.
R1 retry: v00_vanilla 100ep, seed 2. R1 complete: noise floor mu=22.31, sigma=0.244 — proxy VALID.
Round 1 first attempt at 25ep — proxy invalid (cannot resolve known 150ep gap; both v00 and v01 still in steep descent, v01 mining inert). Result preserved for reference.
Round 1 first attempt at 25ep, v01_current. neg_loss=0 every epoch (margin=50 hinge inert at random init). Proxy invalid; v01 dropped from future proxy rounds.
DG-ANM v01 resume e125->e150 seed 0. Final 10K FID 16.72.
DG-ANM v01 resume e125->e150 seed 1. Final 10K FID 32.91.
DG-ANM v01 resume e125->e150 seed 2. Final 10K FID 15.35.

completed_runs.note: Mean 10K FID 21.66 +- 9.95; neg_loss=0 on 99% of epochs at margin=50. DG-ANM v01 formulation is broken — absolute worse than vanilla and high-variance. Triggered program.md restructure to variant search.

completed_runs.description: Stage B vanilla EqM-B/2 IN-100 80ep seed 2. Train+sample 50K complete (exit 0, 6h23m). FID step failed: KeyError 'mu' — ref-stats schema mismatch. Samples + checkpoint preserved. FID fixable offline.

completed_runs.headline: All 3 DG-ANM extension seeds timed out at 8h walltime, reaching e147-150 of 150. Background rsync loop successfully persisted e125 checkpoints. Resubmitted as 7455358 which completed.
Train+sample DONE 6h13m. FID failed KeyError 'mu'. Samples + checkpoint preserved.

completed_runs.summary: Vanilla EqM on FM UNet reached epoch 1459/1800 in 48h walltime. FID plateau ~9.5-10.0 on 5K samples from e600 onwards. Defines the variant-search baseline to beat.

completed_runs.headline: DG-ANM v01 statistically WORSE than vanilla at e100 (Welch t~3.1 sigma). DG-ANM seed variance 27x vanilla's. Confirmed in resubmit 7455358 (10K FID 21.66 +- 9.95 vs vanilla 12.54 +- 1.15).

completed_runs.reason: Confirmed inert by diag_dganm_signal.py: ||field|| ~47, margin=5 produces zero gradient. Killed after ~26h compute.

completed_runs.note: Prior single-seed IN-100 gain since invalidated by 3-seed CIFAR seed study (see cifar_seed_study_COMPLETE).

archived_autoresearch_hp.reason: Hyperparameter autoresearch abandoned 2026-04-23. Replaced by variant-search autoresearch (see autoresearch_variants). HP sweep history preserved in results_hp_archive.tsv.
archived_autoresearch_hp.terminated_reason: HP tuning on an inert primitive cannot recover signal. Structural fix required — see program.md and documentation/research-plan.md.

events.detail: DG-ANM EqM-B/2 80-epoch (1 seed, IN-100) FID 112.58. Later invalidated by 3-seed CIFAR seed study.
diag_dganm_signal.py: ||field|| ~47 at mined negatives, margin=5 gives zero gradient. DG-ANM hinge is inert at any realistic margin.
CIFAR 3v3 seed study: DG-ANM e100 30% FID-worse than vanilla, 27x variance.
DG-ANM v01 CIFAR 150ep 3-seed 10K FID 21.66 +- 9.95 vs vanilla 12.54 +- 1.15. Confirms v01 formulation is broken.

Abandoned HP tuning. Autoresearch restructured around code variants informed by literature review (VeCoR 2025, Du 2021 CD, Luo 2023 DCD, Pidstrigach 2022, Kim 2024 CTM). Variant slate v00..v06 in experiments/dganm_variants/. Old HP history archived to results_hp_archive.tsv.

Reconciled 3-week-stale pipeline state vs sacct. Stage A gate PASSED for v02 (gap 2.10 FID). Stage B vanilla IN-1K baseline trusted (FID 31.41). v02 IN-1K 80ep cancelled 2x. v10 hard-example proposal drafted (e36ca0f) as Stage B pivot.

15-week summer plan locked. Broad framing. Targets: NeurIPS 2026 workshop (Aug 29) + ICLR 2027 (~Oct 1). NeurIPS 2026 main missed. Differentiation locked vs DAT (Wu 2025) and AEBM-Diff (Geng 2024). 2400 GPU-h budget.
Phase 0 spec written to documentation/phase-0-spec.md. Five tasks with pre-registered gates. Project scope locked to diff-EqM only in CLAUDE.md.

Phase 0 extended 7->14 days. Lit-review tasks 0.A.1/0.A.2/0.A.3 + 0.B synthesis-apply lead the phase. ~18 papers across 5 buckets. SYNTHESIS.md feeds v10 mechanism design, v11 fallback, framing. CLAUDE.md adds literature review protocol.

Branch B-Both locked. Lin et al. AFM/CAFM identified as dominant prior. Combine v10 PGD with CAFM discriminator AT on EqM (Phases 1-4) + SiT head-to-head Phase 5. Repo github.com/ByteDance-Seed/Adversarial-Flow-Models cloned for adaptation. Compute budget revised to ~2600 GPU-h (15% over 2400).

17 papers read, SYNTHESIS.md written. Positioning sharpened: 'first adaptive hard-negative mining for regression-target generative models' per VeCoR future-work cite. Mechanism threat from Briglia (invariance fails diffusion AT) flagged; v10-equivariant fallback ready. CAFM-EqM port design + v10+CAFM combination design + v11 fallback all locked. EqM confirmed latent-space (SD VAE 4x32x32) - CAFM port directly compatible. Lin repo cloned (MIT). SSH locked - v02 postmortem deferred.
Phase 1a Day-1+2 code complete: foundational helpers (5 modules), train scaffold, configs, sbatch, CIFAR variant. All local smoke tests + 14-unit-test suite PASS. Cluster work pending SSH refresh.
Cluster SSH restored. v02 postmortem complete (cosine saturation mechanism failure, not OOM/timeout). Submitted: v10 CIFAR sanity (13848000) + CAFM-EqM 500-step smoke (13848066).

active_runs.description: Phase 0.3: v10 hard-example CIFAR sanity 150ep, variant harness. Pre-registered gates: no collapse, L_hard>L_clean first 50% of steps, ||delta|| at L2 boundary.
Phase 1a smoke: 500-step CAFM-EqM end-to-end validation on top of vanilla EqM-B/2 31.41 ckpt. Validates port: loss flow, discriminator integration, no NaN. ~6-15 min.
active_runs.gate: training loop completes 500 steps, losses finite, no NaN, discriminator loss not collapsed to 0
